name: Dock Port Side – Unofficial Stationeers Wiki

properties.description: Opens the Docking Port, when set to 1. Closes the it, when set to 0.
Locks the Docking Port, when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.
Turns the Docking Port on, when set to 1. Turns the Docking Port off, when set to 0.
Returns whether the Docking Port is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes) (Assumption)
Returns the current amount of power, required by the Docking Port, in Watts.
